name: Josh Wright
abilities: ★ Never Sleeps — the last man standing every night of the Open. While the field folds — Sleepy Joe in his chair, Korey face-down in the sand — Josh greets the dawn wide awake and crazy-eyed. He lobbied for a cash bounty on whoever sleeps the least.
Wins the Night. "No one needs air conditioning if you don't sleep." A Ryder Cup captain (with Adison), and a steady climber by day — net finishes 9th → 6th.
flavor: “Me and Owen win the night. See you tomorrow, fuckers.”
caption: Josh Wright · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
